title: The Prince of Tempters
writer: Robert Benchley, Paul Bern, E. Phillips Oppenheim
actors: Lois Moran, Ben Lyon, Lya De Putti
plot: While in Italy, the Duke of Chatsfield secretly marries a peasant girl, and they have a child, Francis. The boy's parents die after having separated, and he is reared in a monastery. When he is 20, Francis takes his final vows, wh...
